scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const file = 'node_modules/next/dist/compiled/browserslist/index.js'; if (fs.existsSync(file)) { const content = fs.readFileSync(file, 'utf8'); if (content.includes('1764339020978<')) { fs.writeFileSync(file, content.replace('1764339020978<(new Date).setMonth((new Date).getMonth()-2)&&console.warn', 'false&&console.warn')); } }"
